final:
module register_with_reset (
	input clk,
	input reset,
	input [3:0] data_in,
	output reg [3:0] data_out);always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
	if (reset) begin
		data_out <= 4'b0000;
	end else begin
		data_out <= data_in;
	end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      data_out <= ~data_in;
    end
  end

endmodule
